variants.title: Mann Filter WK 842/23 x Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550790
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER fuel filters remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage. Thanks to the highest degree of separation and sealing, the fuel filter ensures functional reliability and optimum protection during the entire maintenance interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P550790 Fuel Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550790 Fuel Cartridge is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard FF5692 Fuel Filter, In-Line | Replaces the Donaldson P550790
variants.description: Fleetguard® FF5692 spin-on fuel filter delivers superior performance using proven media technology, removing harmful contaminants. Fleetguard fuel filters ensure optimal fuel system protection to meet or exceed OEM specifications.
